it you grew up in the American South and

it's the outside world but you have the

Models because they said if you see a

for the agent in our hometown and
Reverend reck now has what we knew know
50 years later had Alzheimers and he

children had to cook and clean and serve
we didn't like it at the time but that's

um 12 Foster sisters and brothers um my

um and again whenever you see a need you

say a full employment economy and so
that if you just follow the need you
will never lack for something to do or
real purpose in life and every issue
that the children's defense fund works

this grandmother got tetanus went to the

11 years years old I remember that an

saw that the black migrant workers were

Children's defense fund to make sure
that child gets immunized against
rentable diseases um unequal schools
unequal
schools separate and unequal hand me

but he the the reinforced lesson was

and I was with one of my Sunday school

what's wrong with me um and they said it

then secretly and switch water signs
everywhere I went and it felt so
good but there
is there is no question that this Legend

because so many of the things that um I

that's a slow process um and nobody

want everybody to leave the state so

down re
refinance um and he went into a a center

um but it was you know it was it you

got lots of new laws millions of

if there were no homeless children if

it's really about what does it mean to

warming
and we're looking at that again I I

that's what our purpose is is to leave a

um and and it's been a privilege to
